title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Agenda November 16, 2022 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW): Agenda November 16, 2022
Date and Time: November 16, 2023, 2:00-4:00 pm EST
Chair: Lorraine Greaves (Chair), Louise Pilote (Vice-chair)
Secretariat: Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration
Participants: SAC-HPW members, Health Canada employees
2:00-2:05 Welcome and Opening Remarks Associate Assistant Deputy Minister, Health Products and Food Branch (HPFB), Health Canada
2:05-2:15 Chair's Address, Introduction of Members, Review of Affiliations and Interests (A&I), Review of Agenda SAC-HPW Chair
2:15-2:25 Session #1: Piloting New Direction with SAC-HPW Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration (CPPIC)
2:25-2:45 Session #2: Overview of HPFB's SGBA Plus Action Plan CPPIC
2:45-3:00 Session #3: Disaggregated Data Strategy (HPFB's SGBA Plus Action Plan) CPPIC
3:00-3:15 Session #3: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
3:15-3:30 Session #4 : Global Harmonization of Clinical Trial Demographic Data CPPIC
3:30-3:45 Session #4: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
3:45-3:50 Secretariat update SAC-HPW Secretariat
3:50-3:55 Closing and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
3:55-4:00 In-Camera Session SAC-HPW members only
